category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a syntax-aware linter for prose; docs.vale.sh describes Vale as a command-line tool for code-like linting of prose.
display_name_sources: docs.vale.sh and the official GitHub README use the project name Vale.
docs_sources: docs.vale.sh is the official documentation site for the Vale CLI and related projects.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/errata-ai/vale; per instructions it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: docs.vale.sh describes prose linting, style rules, markup support, and CLI usage; source_facts.description confirms syntax-aware prose linting.
